testcase.name: @stynx-web/angular-profile > validates the profile form and emits only when dirty and valid
@stynx-web/angular-profile > saves profile changes through ProfileService and reports failures
@stynx-web/angular-profile > tracks dirty state in the preferences form
@stynx-web/angular-profile > saves preferences through ProfileService, changes locale, and reports failures
@stynx-web/angular-profile > opens the configured change-password hosted action
@stynx-web/angular-profile > marks MFA enrolment unavailable when no hosted action URL is configured
@stynx-web/angular-profile > reports hosted action configuration errors to the standard error banner
